site.title: Ralph Engine
site.description: The open-source runtime for agentic coding workflows.
hero.headline: Agentic workflows. Orchestrated.
hero.tagline: An open-source Rust CLI that gives AI coding agents typed plugin contracts, runtime checks, MCP servers, and quality gates.
hero.install.label: Install from source
features.plugins.title: Plugin contracts
features.plugins.description: 8 official plugins with typed manifests, auto-discovery, and runtime validation. Create your own with one command.
features.checks.title: Runtime checks
features.checks.description: Prepare-time and doctor-time checks that validate your project before the agent loop starts.
features.agents.title: Agent runtimes
features.agents.description: First-class Claude, Codex, and ClaudeBox integration with typed bootstrap plans and binary probing.
features.mcp.title: MCP servers
features.mcp.description: Typed MCP launch contracts with process models, working directory policies, and availability checks.
agents.title: Works with your agent
agents.description: Ralph Engine integrates with the agents you already use.
catalog.title: Official plugins
catalog.description: 8 plugins covering templates, agent runtimes, MCP integrations, policies, and remote control.
getting-started.title: Get started in 3 steps
getting-started.step1.title: Install
getting-started.step2.title: Check your setup
getting-started.step3.title: Create a plugin
plugin.install.note: Also available via pnpm add -g ralph-engine or yarn global add ralph-engine. All 8 official plugins are bundled — no separate install needed.
